site.title: El Rabón Farm
hero.tagline: A place where nature meets celebration
about.heading: Our Story
about.p1: Nestled among rolling hills and ancient trees, El Rabón Farm is a place where the beauty of nature creates the perfect backdrop for life's most meaningful moments.
about.p2: Our family has cared for this land for generations, cultivating not just crops but a deep connection to the earth and the community around us.
about.p3: Today, we open our doors to those seeking a venue that feels both timeless and alive — a place where celebrations become memories woven into the landscape itself.
gallery.preview.heading: A Glimpse of the Farm
cta.heading: Host Your Next Event at El Rabón
cta.text: From intimate gatherings to grand celebrations, our farm provides a one-of-a-kind setting for weddings, corporate events, and private parties.

gallery.subtitle: Explore the beauty of El Rabón Farm through our collection of photos.
